introSection:
Python Pit is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Go-Karts Plus in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA.

In 2004, a five-year-old boy was injured after falling from the roller coaster. He had become frightened and crawled out of the seat.
fullText:
Python Pit is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Go-Karts Plus in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA.

In 2004, a five-year-old boy was injured after falling from the roller coaster. He had become frightened and crawled out of the seat.
